basic_details.job_title: ESIC Gwalior Recruitment 2026 - Walk in for 40 Specialist and Senior Residents Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Hospital, Gwalior
basic_details.total_vacancies: Specialist (Full Time/Part Time), Senior Resident (3 Years), Senior Resident (1 Year)
basic_details.short_information: ESIC Hospital, Tansen Nagar, Gwalior (Madhya Pradesh) has released a walk-in interview notification for contractual engagement of Specialists (Full Time/ Part Time), Senior Residents (3 Years) and Senior Residents (1 Year) across 40 posts. The first walk-in interview will be held on 29 July 2026, and subsequent interviews will be conducted on the 3rd Wednesday of every month. This article covers vacancy details, eligibility, salary, application fee, documents required, and the complete selection process based on the official advertisement (No. ESICH/GWL/Estt/CONTRACTUALMEDICALOFFICER-07//2026)

important_dates.raw: First Walk-in Interview Date: 29 July 2026 Reporting Time: 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM (no candidate is allowed for document verification after 11:00 AM) Subsequent Interviews: 3rd Wednesday of every month If 3rd Wednesday is a gazetted holiday: Interview shifts to the immediately following Thursday, or as notified

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 500/- (as per main notification) / Rs. 300/- (as per Annexure-A) - verify before payment
application_fee.details: Mode of Payment: Demand Draft in favour of 'ESI Fund Account No. 1', payable at Gwalior.

age_limit.details: Post Maximum Age (as on date of interview) Senior Resident (1 Year/3 Years) 45 years (age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-servicemen as per DoPT rules) Full Time/Part Time Specialist 67 years

qualification.details: For Senior Resident (1 Year and 3 Years): | MBBS from an institution recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC)/Medical Council of India/State Medical Council Post-Graduate Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant discipline recognized by NMC/MCI/National Board of Examinations Registration with NMC/Madhya Pradesh Medical Council is mandatory No prior experience needed for PG qualification holders Alternative route: MBBS candidates with 2 years of experience (including at least 1 year in the concerned specialty) from a government or private hospital (not a private clinic) may be appointed for 1 year as Senior Resident, but only if PG-qualified doctors are not available | For Full Time/Part Time Specialist: | MBBS recognized by NMC/MCI/State Medical Council PG Degree/Diploma (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant specialty Registration with NMC/Madhya Pradesh Medical Council Experience: 3 years post-PG Degree, OR minimum 5 years post-PG Diploma in the concerned specialty

salary_details.senior resident (1 year/3 years): Pay Level-11, basic pay Rs. 67,700/- plus other admissible allowances (on no work no pay basis)
salary_details.full time specialist: Pay Level-11, basic pay Rs. 67,700/- plus other admissible allowances
salary_details.part time specialist: Rs. 60,000/- per month for a 4-hour session, 4 days a week, + Rs. 15,000/- for emergency call availability. Extra hours beyond 16 hrs/week paid at Rs. 800/hr (subject to Medical Superintendent's approval)

selection_process: Candidates report at the venue between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the scheduled date with the filled application (Annexure-A) and all documents Document verification is conducted first Only candidates whose documents are verified and found eligible are allowed to appear for the interview Selection is based on the interview and is subject to a medical fitness certificate issued by the Medical Board at ESIC Hospital
Gwalior The decision of the selection board is final
how_to_apply: Download and fill the application form in the prescribed format (Annexure-A)
Attach a recent passport-size photograph and self-attested copies of all required certificates
Prepare the Demand Draft (if applicable) in favour of 'ESI Fund Account No. 1', payable at Gwalior
Report directly to the Medical Superintendent's Office (Room #1), ESIC Hospital, Tansen Road, Gwalior, between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the scheduled interview date
Undergo document verification, followed by the interview if found eligible
There is no online application process for this recruitment - candidates must apply and appear in person on the walk-in date.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview or for joining the post Selected candidates must furnish a security deposit of Rs. 10,000/- via DD/Banker's Cheque in favour of 'ESIC Fund A/c No.1', payable at Gwalior - refundable after successful completion of the contract Selected candidates must sign an agreement with the Medical Superintendent on a Non-Judicial Stamp Paper of Rs. 1,000/- Private practice is not allowed for engaged Specialists and Senior Residents Specialists must be available on call 24x7 and hold a professional indemnity insurance policy (minimum sum assured ranges from Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 30 lakh depending on specialty); proof must be submitted within 7 days of engagement No hostel accommodation, quarters, or uniform will be provided The contractual engagement can be terminated by either side with one month's prior notice, without assigning any reason Selected candidates get no claim for regularization, PF, pension, gratuity, seniority, or promotion Full-time Specialists get priority over part-time appointees If a regular incumbent joins, the contractual appointment will be terminated immediately at the Medical Superintendent's discretion

rows.details: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Hospital, Gwalior
Specialist (Full Time/Part Time), Senior Resident (3 Years), Senior Resident (1 Year)
Medical Superintendent Office (Room #1), ESIC Hospital, Tansen Road, Gwalior – 474002

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gwalior Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: First Walk-in Interview Date: 29 July 2026 Reporting Time: 9:00 AM to 11:00 AM (no candidate is allowed for document verification after 11:00 AM) Subsequent Interviews: 3rd Wednesday of every month If 3rd Wednesday is a gazetted holiday: Interview shifts to the immediately following Thursday, or as notified

content_sections.heading: ESIC Gwalior Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: A total of 40 posts are open across three categories. Category-wise (UR/OBC/SC/ST/EWS) breakup for each department is given below. Note: The hospital reserves the right to increase, decrease, or cancel any vacancy at any stage without prior notice.

tables.caption: A. Full Time / Part Time Specialist (FTS/PTS) - 17 Posts
B. Senior Resident (3 Years - Under Central Residency Scheme) - 14 Posts

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For Senior Resident (1 Year and 3 Years): MBBS from an institution recognized by the National Medical Commission (NMC)/Medical Council of India/State Medical Council Post-Graduate Diploma/Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant discipline recognized by NMC/MCI/National Board of Examinations Registration with NMC/Madhya Pradesh Medical Council is mandatory No prior experience needed for PG qualification holders Alternative route: MBBS candidates with 2 years of experience (including at least 1 year in the concerned specialty) from a government or private hospital (not a private clinic) may be appointed for 1 year as Senior Resident, but only if PG-qualified doctors are not available For Full Time/Part Time Specialist: MBBS recognized by NMC/MCI/State Medical Council PG Degree/Diploma (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant specialty Registration with NMC/Madhya Pradesh Medical Council Experience: 3 years post-PG Degree, OR minimum 5 years post-PG Diploma in the concerned specialty

rows.maximum_age_as_on_date_of_interview: 45 years (age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-servicemen as per DoPT rules)

rows.salary_emoluments: Pay Level-11, basic pay Rs. 67,700/- plus other admissible allowances (on no work no pay basis)
Pay Level-11, basic pay Rs. 67,700/- plus other admissible allowances

Rs. 60,000/- per month for a 4-hour session, 4 days a week, + Rs. 15,000/- for emergency call availability. Extra hours beyond 16 hrs/week paid at Rs. 800/hr (subject to Medical Superintendent's approval)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: Mode of Payment: Demand Draft in favour of 'ESI Fund Account No. 1', payable at Gwalior.

rows.fee: Rs. 500/- (as per main notification) / Rs. 300/- (as per Annexure-A) - verify before payment

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Candidates report at the venue between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the scheduled date with the filled application (Annexure-A) and all documents Document verification is conducted first Only candidates whose documents are verified and found eligible are allowed to appear for the interview Selection is based on the interview and is subject to a medical fitness certificate issued by the Medical Board at ESIC Hospital, Gwalior The decision of the selection board is final

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for Walk-in Interview
content_sections.text: Candidates must bring originals along with one set of self-attested photocopies of the following: Identity Proof (PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, Voter Card, Aadhaar Card) Address Proof (Ration Card, Passport, Driving License, Aadhaar Card) Date of Birth Certificate (Class 10th Certificate) Two recent passport-size photographs Class 10th and 12th mark sheets/certificates Proof of Educational Qualification (MBBS, MD/MS/DNB, etc. as per NMC guidelines) Internship Completion Certificate NMC/Madhya Pradesh Medical Council Registration and Renewal Madhya Pradesh Medical Council Registration (within 30 days of joining, if not already registered) Additional Medical Qualification Registration Certificate Experience Certificates (where applicable) Reservation Certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PH) in the Government of India prescribed format; OBC certificate must show non-creamy layer status and be from the central list No Objection Certificate (NOC) from current employer, if already employed Demand Draft, as applicable Aadhaar/PAN card and bank passbook copies (required from selected candidates at the time of joining)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ESIC Gwalior Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Download and fill the application form in the prescribed format (Annexure-A) Attach a recent passport-size photograph and self-attested copies of all required certificates Prepare the Demand Draft (if applicable) in favour of 'ESI Fund Account No. 1', payable at Gwalior Report directly to the Medical Superintendent's Office (Room #1), ESIC Hospital, Tansen Road, Gwalior, between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM on the scheduled interview date Undergo document verification, followed by the interview if found eligible There is no online application process for this recruitment - candidates must apply and appear in person on the walk-in date.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview or for joining the post Selected candidates must furnish a security deposit of Rs. 10,000/- via DD/Banker's Cheque in favour of 'ESIC Fund A/c No.1', payable at Gwalior - refundable after successful completion of the contract Selected candidates must sign an agreement with the Medical Superintendent on a Non-Judicial Stamp Paper of Rs. 1,000/- Private practice is not allowed for engaged Specialists and Senior Residents Specialists must be available on call 24x7 and hold a professional indemnity insurance policy (minimum sum assured ranges from Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 30 lakh depending on specialty); proof must be submitted within 7 days of engagement No hostel accommodation, quarters, or uniform will be provided The contractual engagement can be terminated by either side with one month's prior notice, without assigning any reason Selected candidates get no claim for regularization, PF, pension, gratuity, seniority, or promotion Full-time Specialists get priority over part-time appointees If a regular incumbent joins, the contractual appointment will be terminated immediately at the Medical Superintendent's discretion

content_sections.heading: Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notificationn PDF: Click Here Official Website: www.esic.gov.in/recruitments ESIC Main Portal: www.esic.gov.in

faq.question: Q1. When is the ESIC Hospital Gwalior walk-in interview 2026?
faq.answer: The first walk-in interview is scheduled for 29 July 2026, with reporting time between 9:00 AM and 11:00 AM. Subsequent interviews will be held on the 3rd Wednesday of every month.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in ESIC Hospital Gwalior recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 40 total vacancies: 17 for Specialist (Full Time/Part Time), 14 for Senior Resident (3 Years), and 9 for Senior Resident (1 Year).

faq.question: Q3. Is there an online application process for ESIC Gwalior recruitment?
faq.answer: No. This is a walk-in interview. Candidates must fill the prescribed Annexure-A application form and appear in person with original documents at the ESIC Hospital, Gwalior on the scheduled date.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for ESIC Hospital Gwalior Senior Resident and Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 45 years for Senior Resident posts and 67 years for Specialist posts, as on the date of interview. Age relaxation applies for SC/ST/OBC/PWD/Ex-servicemen as per DoPT rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ESIC Gwalior recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: SC/ST/Female/Ex-Servicemen/PH candidates are exempted from the fee. For other categories, the notification mentions Rs. 500/- in the main text and Rs. 300/- in the application annexure — candidates should confirm the exact amount on the official website before preparing the Demand Draft.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Senior Resident and Specialist at ESIC Hospital Gwalior?
faq.answer: Senior Residents and Full Time Specialists are paid at Pay Level-11 with a basic pay of Rs. 67,700/- plus allowances. Part Time Specialists receive Rs. 60,000/- per month plus Rs. 15,000/- for emergency call availability, with extra hourly pay for additional work.

faq.question: Q7. Is TA/DA provided for attending the ESIC Gwalior interview?
faq.answer: No. The notification clearly states that no TA/DA will be admissible for attending the walk-in interview or for joining the post.
